hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r fp; if echo "$fp" | grep -q '/content/'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You edited a content/ file. Per CLAUDE.md, you MUST append a footer note to this file stating it was written/edited in collaboration with Claude (name yourself). Prefix the footer with a random emoji. Do this before your next tool call."}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
